name: Pokkit
description: Self-hosted file storage server for uploading, listing, downloading, and deleting files

endpoints.name: upload_file
endpoints.description: Upload a file to Pokkit storage. Returns download URL and file ID.

endpoints.name: list_files
endpoints.description: List all stored files with metadata

endpoints.name: delete_file
endpoints.description: Delete a file by its ID

endpoints.name: get_status
endpoints.description: Get storage statistics (total files, disk usage, etc.)
